in ARCL3A; loss of punctate pattern in mitochondria when overexpressed
in ADCL3; loss of punctate pattern in mitochondria when overexpressed; no effect on interaction with wild-type protein; dbSNP:rs863225045
in ADCL3; no effect on protein abundance; decreased intracellular proline levels; loss of filament formation; dbSNP:rs863225044

in SPG9A; decreased protein abundance; no effect on localization to the mitochondrion; altered homohexamerization; loss of glutamate 5-kinase activity; no effect on glutamate-5-semialdehyde dehydrogenase activity; decreased amino acid biosynthetic process; dbSNP:rs864321669

in SPG9A; altered homohexamerization; no effect on localization to the mitochondrion; loss of glutamate 5-kinase activity; no effect on glutamate-5-semialdehyde dehydrogenase activity; decreased amino acid biosynthetic process; dbSNP:rs864321670
in ARCL3A; does not affect proline and ornithine biosynthetic activity; dbSNP:rs121434583

resource_cards.label: PSIPRED
resource_cards.resource_hint: Defaults to the local PSIPRED binaries in envs/bio-tools when present.
resource_cards.summary: Secondary structure prediction from sequence, using PSIPRED single-sequence mode by default.

section_status.label: Human protein resolution
section_status.summary: Resolve the canonical protein sequence for the submitted human target.

section_status.label: Variant parsing and validation
section_status.summary: Parse missense substitutions and verify that the wild-type residue matches the resolved sequence.

section_status.label: Wild-type versus mutant metrics
section_status.summary: Compare baseline sequence composition and ProtParam-style metrics after the substitution.

section_status.label: Secondary structure prediction
section_status.summary: PSIPRED-derived helix, strand, and coil calls are rendered as intervals, tracks, and residue summaries.

section_status.label: RSA and ASA prediction
section_status.summary: DMVFL-RSA-driven relative and absolute solvent accessibility is rendered with residue-level graphics and tables when the local model repo is present.

site_features.description: Predicted state at residue 372 is alpha helix with confidence 0.55.
